title: Waiting for Your Message
content: Sophia checked her phone many times that afternoon. She hoped Mason would send her a message after their wonderful date the night before. She tried to stay busy by reading and cleaning her apartment, but she kept looking at the screen. Finally, her phone buzzed. Mason wrote, “I can't stop thinking about yesterday. Would you like to see me again?” Sophia smiled so brightly that everyone around her noticed. The wait had been worth every minute.
